economic_notes: Le Grand Royal Wôlinak S.E.C. is a major enterprise generating significant revenue (revenues 12,289,916, expenses 9,232,277). Other enterprises include 9101-2658 Quebec inc. (Residence au Soleil Levant), 9323-8996 Quebec inc. (Traiteur W), 9417-6831 Quebec inc., and 9395-5458 Quebec inc. (Abaziak Construction partnership). Online casino generated 500,000 in revenues with surplus of 217,789.
notes: Qualified audit opinion (opinion avec reserve) due to: (1) two wholly-owned subsidiaries (9101-2658 Quebec inc. / Residence au Soleil Levant and 9323-8996 Quebec inc. / Traiteur W) not consolidated per NCSP - accounted for using modified equity method instead; (2) non-adoption of SP 3280 obligations related to decommissioning of capital assets. Carrefour Wôlinak inc. is the only fully consolidated subsidiary (100%). Le Grand Royal Wôlinak S.E.C. is a major enterprise generating approximately 12.3M in revenues. Total government transfers breakdown not fully determinable from available text - ISC receivable shown as 1,051,408. Restricted cash includes SCHL replacement reserve 264,880 and fiducie d'Ottawa 11,718. Placements reserves (obligations) total 3,000,000. New SP 3400 revenue standard adopted prospectively April 1, 2023.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
